title: RGCS optical probe configuration
description: One optical probe arm for a run (Agent 06). Binding rules: the pre-registered null expectation for every directional observable is NO asymmetry (DECISION_LOG D6-003); any directional claim requires the full reversal battery (beam reversal, polarization flip, coil phase flip, sham timing) plus a heating control at matched absorbed power; laser safety class and interlock are mandatory metadata; no beam parameter here authorizes exceeding laser-class limits or human exposure.

power_mw.description: Optical power at the crystal (mW). Capped at 5 mW (Class 3R ceiling) for this schema; higher-power work is out of scope of the v3 programme.

laser_class.description: IEC 60825 class of the source as operated. Class 3B/4 intentionally not representable.

interlock_present.description: Beam-block / enclosure interlock in place. Must be true for any run with power_mw > 1.

stokes.description: Normalized (s1, s2, s3); RSCS-C.9 convention, s3 = +1 is sigma+.

modulated.description: True if polarization is modulated during the run.

entry_facet.description: Facet identifier on the specimen, e.g. 'F3' per specimen geometry record.

entry_point_mm.description: Entry point in the crystal-axis frame (mm).

target.description: Interior target location. These are DISTINCT locations (node menu, RGCS_CRYSTAL_APPLICATION.md section 3); record which one is addressed.

target_point_mm.description: Required when target = custom, or the measured location when target = measured_node.

refractive_branch.description: Which index branch the probe polarization sees.

direction.description: Beam direction for this arm. Directional claims need a paired run with the opposite value.

reversal_pair_id.description: probe_id of the opposite-direction paired run; required before any directional-asymmetry analysis.

mechanism.description: Conventional mechanism this probe can sense. Quantitative expectations from rgcs_core.optics (photoelastic_index_shift, quartz_acousto_optic_m2).

classification.description: Class of the magnitude estimate, per SCIENTIFIC_CLASSIFICATION_POLICY.md.

prediction_ref.description: Where the number comes from (function/doc section).

controls.description: Controls attached to this probe. Directional claims require at minimum beam_reversal + sham_timing + heating_matched_power_off_node (D6-003).

hypothesis_ids.description: CLAIM_REGISTER rows this probe feeds (H-20..H-23 for the Agent 06 optical claims).
